visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium shot of a young woman standing inside a large retail warehouse. She wears a dark blue off-the-shoulder ruffled top, blue jeans, a small gold necklace, and a dark blue beret adorned with small white butterfly clips. She speaks energetically, her eyes wide and mouth moving quickly. Behind her, a blurred crowd of shoppers moves through the aisles, and a large Costco logo is overlaid at the top of the frame. Bright artificial warehouse lighting illuminates the scene, highlighting her vibrant expression. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of a refrigerated display case filled with pre-packaged seafood. Trays of salmon heads wrapped in clear plastic are neatly arranged on the shelves. A price tag specifically lists 'FRESH NORWAY SALMON HEAD' with a markdown from 399 to 370 per kilogram. Bright yellow and red variety text overlays appear to emphasize the discount. (3) The shot returns to the woman, who continues her narration with animated hand gestures, bringing her hands together and then pointing towards the display. She adjusts her beret briefly while looking directly into the lens. The background shows more shoppers with carts and stainless steel fixtures typical of a supermarket's meat or seafood section. The pace of the video is fast, matching her enthusiastic delivery.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Costco WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 我們拍好市多這麼多年. (2) [Variety]: 不能說的秘密：隱藏商品. [Subtitle]: 我們發現一個隱藏商品. (3) [Variety]: 一年四季它都在特價. [Subtitle]: 一年四季它都在特價. (4) [Subtitle]: 就是這個. (5) [Slogan]: 空運鮭魚頭. [Variety]: 永遠在打折. [Subtitle]: 空運鮭魚頭，永遠在打折. (6) [Subtitle]: 如果你有燉湯的需求. (7) [Subtitle]: 或者是...好. (8) [Subtitle]: 因為我沒買過. (9) [Subtitle]: 大家都會買這個鮭魚頭做什麼. (10) [Subtitle]: 快點留言告訴我們. (11) [Subtitle]: 因為我們每一週都會拍本週特價. (12) [Subtitle]: 沒有追蹤我們的人也可以追蹤. (13) [Subtitle]: 就會把握最及時的. (14) [Variety]: 特價資訊. [Subtitle]: 特價資訊. (15) [Subtitle]: 但是它永遠在特價. (16) [Subtitle]: 它還可以做什麼樣的料理. (17) [Subtitle]: 留言告訴我，拜託了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, approximately 4 background shoppers moving in the warehouse.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with shoulder-length black hair, wearing a dark blue beret with butterfly pins and a navy ruffled off-the-shoulder blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse featuring industrial shelves, refrigerated glass cases, and crowds of shoppers with metal carts.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice speaking in Mandarin with a fast speech rate and high vocal arousal. Her tone is friendly and engaging. An upbeat, bouncy background music track with an electronic/pop feel and a steady 124 BPM tempo runs consistently underneath her voice. The music features synthesizers and a clear, percussive beat. (2) At approximately five seconds, a sharp 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition as the visual focus shifts. The speaker's voice maintains its high energy and bright resonance. The ambient noise floor consists of a low, continuous hum of large refrigeration units and distant, muffled warehouse chatter. (3) As the speaker continues her monologue, her pitch variability remains high, conveying excitement. The BGM maintains its volume, creating a balanced mix where speech is clear. Toward the end of the recording, the speaker's tone shifts slightly toward a pleading, inquisitive inflection as she asks the audience for input. There is no audible technical distortion, and the signal-to-noise ratio is high.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Reveal -> Explanation -> Engagement -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform viewers about a perpetually discounted salmon product at Costco and to encourage audience interaction regarding cooking methods.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video specifically highlights a product, its price, and the store brand (Costco) to encourage purchases or visits.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media style editing with high-energy narration and variety-show captions to maintain viewer interest.
